title: Preface
abstract: Parts of this book were originally published as an issue of the Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society B: Biological Sciences (Volume 362; Issue 1485) but have been modified and updated. Anil Seth's contribution to the book was supported by EPSRC Leadership Fellowship EP/G007543/1 and by a donation from the Dr Mortimer and Theresa Sackler Foundation. Tony Prescott's contribution was supported by the EU 7th Framework Programme via the projects BIOTACT (ICT-215910) and EFAA (ICT-270490). Joanna Bryson's effort was funded in part by the US Air Force Office of Scientific Research, Air Force Material Command, USAF, under grant number FA8655-10-1-3050.
